item.title: Quarterly Earnings Review: Dec-2025 Results Reveal Mixed Trends Across Market Caps
item.description: The December 2025 quarter earnings season has unfolded with a nuanced picture across Indian equities, as 4,093 companies reported results. While the overall proportion of positive earnings outcomes has inched up to 46.0%, this marks a modest improvement compared to the preceding quarters, reflecting a cautiously optimistic corporate environment amid ongoing macroeconomic challenges. Time: 29 minutes ago

item.title: Sai Life Sciences Ltd Gains 3.89%: 5 Key Factors Driving the Surge
item.description: Sai Life Sciences Ltd delivered a solid weekly gain of 3.89%, closing at Rs.1,036.90 on 6 March 2026, outperforming the Sensex which declined 3.00% over the same period. The stock demonstrated strong resilience and momentum, hitting multiple 52-week and all-time highs midweek before a modest pullback on the final trading day. This performance was underpinned by robust financial results, a significant upgrade in investment rating, and a marked shift to bullish technical momentum. Time: 43 minutes ago

item.title: Vishal Mega Mart Declines 4.97%: Technical Weakness and Valuation Concerns Drive Downtrend
item.description: Vishal Mega Mart Ltd closed the week ending 6 March 2026 at Rs.111.95, marking a 4.97% decline from the previous Friday’s close of Rs.117.80. This underperformance came amid a broadly negative market backdrop, with the Sensex falling 3.00% over the same period. The stock’s week was characterised by a series of technical downgrades, sharp intraday price pressures, and a shift to bearish momentum, reflecting growing investor caution despite solid underlying fundamentals. Time: 43 minutes ago

item.title: Dam Capital Advisors Ltd Falls 9.15%: 5 Key Factors Behind the Steep Decline
item.description: Dam Capital Advisors Ltd’s shares fell sharply by 9.15% over the week ending 6 March 2026, closing at Rs.136.55 from Rs.150.30 the previous Friday. This decline significantly outpaced the Sensex’s 3.00% drop during the same period, reflecting persistent downward pressure amid deteriorating financial results, technical weakness, and waning institutional interest. Time: 43 minutes ago

item.title: Mamata Machinery Ltd Falls 7.89%: 2 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Decline
item.description: Mamata Machinery Ltd’s shares declined by 7.89% over the week ending 6 March 2026, closing at Rs.403.75 from Rs.438.35 the previous Friday. This underperformance occurred despite the broader Sensex falling 3.00% during the same period, indicating a sharper correction for the stock amid deteriorating fundamentals and a shift to bearish technical momentum. Time: 43 minutes ago

item.title: Transrail Lighting Ltd Falls 8.78%: Mixed Technical Signals and Market Pressure Define the Week
item.description: Transrail Lighting Ltd experienced a challenging week, with its stock price declining by 8.78% from Rs.564.85 to Rs.515.25, underperforming the Sensex which fell 3.00% over the same period. The week was marked by a sharp gap down on 2 March amid market concerns and a subsequent shift to a mildly bearish technical momentum, reflecting investor caution amid mixed signals. Time: 43 minutes ago

item.title: Sanathan Textiles Ltd Falls 2.05%: 3 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Decline
item.description: Sanathan Textiles Ltd closed the week ending 6 March 2026 at Rs.406.10, down 2.05% from the previous Friday’s close of Rs.414.60. This underperformance came despite the broader Sensex falling 3.00% over the same period, indicating a relative resilience amid a challenging market backdrop. The week was marked by significant valuation shifts, a downgrade to a Strong Sell rating, and bearish technical signals that collectively influenced investor sentiment and price action. Time: 43 minutes ago

item.title: Concord Enviro Systems Ltd Drops 9.10%: 7 Key Factors Behind the Steep Decline
item.description: Concord Enviro Systems Ltd’s shares declined sharply by 9.10% over the week ending 6 March 2026, closing at Rs.270.10 from Rs.297.15. This underperformance was more pronounced than the Sensex’s 3.00% fall, reflecting sustained bearish momentum amid deteriorating fundamentals, technical downgrades, and reduced institutional interest. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Ventive Hospitality Ltd Edges Lower 0.01% Amid Mixed Technical and Valuation Signals
item.description: Ventive Hospitality Ltd closed the week almost flat at Rs.694.90, a marginal decline of 0.01% from the previous Friday’s close of Rs.695.00, while the Sensex fell sharply by 3.00% over the same period. The stock’s relative resilience amid a broadly negative market backdrop was marked by a volatile week featuring a strong opening day rally followed by a gradual pullback, coinciding with a downgrade in its investment rating and a shift in technical momentum. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Indo Farm Equipment Ltd Falls 3.78% Amid Strong Sell Downgrade and Bearish Momentum
item.description: Indo Farm Equipment Ltd’s stock declined by 3.78% over the week ending 6 March 2026, closing at Rs.128.45 from Rs.133.50 the previous Friday. This underperformance contrasted with the Sensex’s 3.00% fall, signalling a sharper loss for the stock amid a backdrop of bearish technical signals, a recent downgrade to Strong Sell, and a new 52-week low reached early in the week. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Standard Engineering Technology Ltd Falls 3.13%: Key Technical Weaknesses and Volatility Shape Week
item.description: Standard Engineering Technology Ltd’s stock declined by 3.13% over the week ending 6 March 2026, closing at Rs.120.80 from Rs.124.70 the previous Friday. This underperformance slightly lagged the Sensex’s 3.00% fall during the same period, reflecting a challenging week marked by a downgrade to a Sell rating, sustained bearish technical momentum, and a volatile gap-up rally on the final trading day. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Laxmi Dental Ltd Falls 5.19%: 4 Key Factors Behind the Weekly Decline
item.description: Laxmi Dental Ltd’s shares declined by 5.19% over the week ending 6 March 2026, closing at Rs.182.50 from Rs.192.50 the previous Friday. This underperformance came despite the broader Sensex falling 3.00% during the same period, signalling a sharper relative weakness in the stock amid deteriorating technical indicators and disappointing financial results. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Stallion India Fluorochemicals Falls 15.39%: 6 Key Factors Driving the Sharp Decline
item.description: Stallion India Fluorochemicals Ltd endured a challenging week from 2 to 6 March 2026, with its share price plunging 15.39% from Rs.128.00 to Rs.108.30, significantly underperforming the Sensex’s 3.00% decline over the same period. The stock faced persistent selling pressure, hitting the lower circuit limit on three consecutive trading days, reflecting deteriorating technical momentum, a downgrade to a Sell rating, and waning investor confidence amid mixed financial signals and sector headwinds. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: OneSource Specialty Pharma Gains 10.04%: 3 Key Factors Driving the Week
item.description: OneSource Specialty Pharma Ltd delivered a notable weekly performance, rising 10.04% from Rs.1,345.75 to Rs.1,480.90 between 2 and 6 March 2026, significantly outperforming the Sensex which declined 3.00% over the same period. The week was marked by a sharp downgrade to Strong Sell, bearish technical momentum, and a strong intraday rally, reflecting a complex interplay of fundamental and technical factors influencing the stock’s trajectory. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Dr Agarwals Health Care Ltd Falls 2.16%: Valuation and Technical Shifts Shape Weekly Performance
item.description: Dr Agarwals Health Care Ltd closed the week down 2.16% at Rs.441.70, underperforming the broader Sensex which fell 3.00%. The stock experienced volatile trading amid a downgrade to Hold by MarketsMOJO and a shift in technical momentum from bullish to sideways. Despite strong underlying financials, valuation concerns and mixed technical indicators weighed on investor sentiment during the week ending 6 March 2026. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Jubilant Agri & Consumer Products Ltd’s 0.68% Weekly Gain Amid Technical Sell-Off
item.description: Jubilant Agri & Consumer Products Ltd experienced a mixed week from 2 to 6 March 2026, closing with a modest gain of 0.68% to Rs.1,838.00, outperforming the Sensex which declined 3.00% over the same period. The stock’s price action was shaped by a significant technical downgrade and bearish momentum signals, alongside a sharp rebound midweek. Despite near-term headwinds, the stock’s relative resilience versus the broader market highlights ongoing investor interest amid technical uncertainty. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Ajax Engineering Ltd Gains 1.15%: 3 Key Technical and Financial Factors Driving the Week
item.description: Ajax Engineering Ltd closed the week ending 6 March 2026 with a modest gain of 1.15%, rising from Rs.485.20 to Rs.490.80, while the Sensex declined sharply by 3.00%. Despite this relative outperformance, the stock faced significant technical setbacks and a downgrade to a Sell rating amid weak price momentum and disappointing financial results. This review analyses the key events shaping the stock’s performance over the week and their implications for investors. Time: 45 minutes ago

item.title: Indef Manufacturing Ltd Falls 7.88%: Technical Downgrades and Financial Weakness Drive Decline
item.description: Indef Manufacturing Ltd experienced a challenging week from 2 to 6 March 2026, with its share price declining by 7.88% to close at Rs.230.85, significantly underperforming the Sensex which fell 3.00% over the same period. The stock faced intensified selling pressure following a downgrade to a Strong Sell rating by MarketsMOJO, reflecting deteriorating technical indicators and weakening financial trends. This review analyses the key events and market reactions that shaped the stock’s performance during the week. Time: 45 minutes ago

item.title: Quality Power Electrical Equipments Ltd Declines 4.13%: Mixed Technical Signals Shape Weekly Performance
item.description: Quality Power Electrical Equipments Ltd closed the week at Rs.832.30, down 4.13% from the previous Friday’s close of Rs.868.15, marginally underperforming the Sensex which declined 3.00% over the same period. The week was marked by a series of technical momentum shifts and a downgrade in the company’s Mojo Grade from Buy to Hold, reflecting a cautious stance amid mixed signals from valuation and technical indicators. Time: 45 minutes ago

item.title: Roadstar Infra Investment Trust Gains 8.33%: Valuation Concerns Temper Momentum
item.description: Roadstar Infra Investment Trust delivered a strong weekly performance, rising 8.33% from ₹60.00 to ₹65.00 between 2 and 6 March 2026, significantly outperforming the Sensex which declined 3.00% over the same period. Despite this price momentum, valuation shifts and mixed financial metrics have raised cautionary signals for investors. Time: 45 minutes ago
